userStories.title: Add member invite by email
userStories.description: As an admin, I want invite members by email so access can be granted quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Invite flow validates email and creates membership invite.

userStories.title: Add role change action
userStories.description: As an admin, I want change member role between viewer, editor, and admin so permissions stay correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Role updates persist new role for member.

userStories.title: Add revoke workspace access action
userStories.description: As an admin, I want revoke workspace access so users can be removed.
acceptanceCriteria: Revoke action removes or disables membership.

userStories.title: Record and view membership audit changes
userStories.description: As an admin, I want audit visibility for membership changes so compliance checks stay possible.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership changes are written to audit log.
Workspace settings page shows recent membership changes.
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
